purpose: Define the human-review, evidence, language, and export gates required before generated artifacts can be circulated.

guardrails: QBR story drafts require human review before circulation.
Do not imply final management decisions or approved investment recommendations.
requirements.nextActionWhenBlocked: Review the draft narrative, evidence labels, unresolved gaps, and caveats with the accountable brand/insights owners.

guardrails: Talk tracks must preserve evidence caveats when spoken.
Do not convert options to consider into final instructions.
requirements.nextActionWhenBlocked: Review the talk track for evidence, caveats, and overclaim language before using it in a meeting.

guardrails: Agency briefs must not infer positioning, creative platform, or approved claims without Brand Strategic Context.
Draft briefs require human review before circulation.
requirements.nextActionWhenBlocked: Load or review official Brand Strategic Context before circulating an agency-facing draft.

guardrails: Evidence packets must separate packet evidence, reviewed-local context, source claims, and missing evidence.
Do not promote source candidates or claims into canonical facts.
requirements.nextActionWhenBlocked: Review source labels, source periods, confidence, and missing evidence before sharing the packet.

guardrails: Learning practice must separate teaching examples from measured brand facts.
Do not score ambiguous or unsupported facts.
requirements.nextActionWhenBlocked: Review the teaching concept, answer rationale, and overclaim warning before distributing practice material.

guardrails: Meeting takeaways are draft notes until reviewed by the meeting owner.
Separate captured decisions from AI suggestions.
requirements.nextActionWhenBlocked: Confirm the takeaway with the meeting owner and decision maker before circulation.

guardrails: Artifact approval may mark a draft reviewed for prototype use, but export remains disabled until the artifact export capability is approved.
Generated artifacts must preserve evidence labels, source caveats, human-review state, and export/circulation gates.
Artifacts are draft support for human decision-making, not final commands.
caveats: This registry defines prototype artifact readiness, not enterprise publishing workflow.
External circulation still requires stakeholder-approved language and an enabled export/circulation capability.
